problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
